leadText: Horseradish (Japanese: ホースラディッシュ Horseradish) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very spicy condiment. Its distinctive sharp sizzle in your sinuses makes it a good match for rich fillings.
